about: A final-year Computer Science student at BRAC University with a passion for bridging the gap between hardware and intelligent software. From developing drone-based crop disease detection systems to building seamless web platforms like Krishak, I focus on creating efficient, real-world solutions.

thesis.title: An Efficient Hybrid Deep Learning Architecture for Crop Disease and Weed Detection from Drone Images
thesis.description: Developed a specialized hybrid model optimized for high-accuracy agricultural monitoring using aerial imagery. This project focuses on enhancing food security through automated, early-stage detection of crop threats.
highlights: Hybrid Architecture: Combines different models for efficiency
Impact: Precision agriculture and food security
